name: parallelogram-coarse-grid-loop
description: Verifier-only coarse-to-fine parallelogram grid search with four deterministic strategy families, shared concise agent reports, scratch-backed CBC tmp files, 30-minute solver budget, bounded parallelism, and no-failure-on-no-improvement iteration semantics.

baselinePct.description: Baseline verified fraction_fixed_to_5 (%) to compare against.

iterations.description: Number of coarse-to-fine experiment loops. No-improvement iterations are recorded and the loop continues.

outputRoot.description: Scratch-backed root for all generated artifacts.

baseRadius.description: Initial local search radius in parallelogram coordinate units; halves each iteration.

lhsCount.description: Initial deterministic local-cloud candidates per iteration.

mediumGrid.description: Medium verification grid before final promotion.

finalParallel.description: Parallel final 2048 verifier subprocesses. For 128GB RAM, keep <=4.

screenSolverLimit.description: CBC solver limit for screen subprocesses, seconds.

mediumSolverLimit.description: CBC solver limit for medium subprocesses, seconds.

finalSolverLimit.description: CBC solver limit for final subprocesses, seconds. Default is 30 minutes.

solverThreads.description: CBC threads per verifier subprocess. Use 1 for broad parallel search.

screenPromote.description: Maximum screen candidates promoted into refinement.

mediumPromote.description: Maximum medium candidates promoted to final.

resetState.description: If true, discard previous state.json and restart from discovered seed.

steps.name: Initialize scratch state and discover seed parallelogram
steps.command:
set -euo pipefail
RESET=""
case "{input.resetState}" in true|1|yes|y) RESET="--reset-state" ;; esac
mkdir -p "{input.outputRoot}"
uv run python .pi/scripts/parallelogram_grid_search.py init --root "{input.outputRoot}" --baseline-pct "{input.baselinePct}" $RESET

steps.name: Bounded coarse-to-fine search loop; no improvement is not failure
Generate four-family coarse candidates around current best
steps.command:
set -euo pipefail
uv run python .pi/scripts/parallelogram_grid_search.py make-candidates \
  --root "{input.outputRoot}" \
  --iteration "{loop.iteration}" \
  --base-radius "{input.baseRadius}" \
  --scale-count "{input.scaleCount}" \
  --shear-count "{input.shearCount}" \
  --coord-count "{input.coordCount}" \
  --lhs-count "{input.lhsCount}"

steps.name: Parallel 128-grid screen sweep
steps.command:
set -euo pipefail
uv run python .pi/scripts/parallelogram_grid_search.py sweep \
  --root "{input.outputRoot}" \
  --iteration "{loop.iteration}" \
  --stage screen \
  --input-csv "{input.outputRoot}/iterations/iter_{loop.iteration}/candidates.csv" \
  --grid "{input.screenGrid}" \
  --parallel "{input.screenParallel}" \
  --solver-limit "{input.screenSolverLimit}" \
  --solver-threads "{input.solverThreads}" \
  --wall-timeout 3600

steps.name: Family-diverse screen promotion
steps.command:
set -euo pipefail
ITER={loop.iteration}
uv run python .pi/scripts/parallelogram_grid_search.py select \
  --input-csv "{input.outputRoot}/iterations/iter_$ITER/screen/screen_results.csv" \
  --output-csv "{input.outputRoot}/iterations/iter_$ITER/screen_promoted.csv" \
  --family-top-k 3 \
  --global-top-k "{input.screenPromote}" \
  --max-selected "{input.screenPromote}"

steps.name: Generate local refinements around promoted candidates
steps.command:
set -euo pipefail
ITER={loop.iteration}
REFINE_RADIUS=$(uv run python - <<'PY'
base=float("{input.baseRadius}")
it=int("{loop.iteration}")
print(base/(2**it))
PY
)
uv run python .pi/scripts/parallelogram_grid_search.py refine \
  --root "{input.outputRoot}" \
  --iteration "{loop.iteration}" \
  --input-csv "{input.outputRoot}/iterations/iter_$ITER/screen_promoted.csv" \
  --radius "$REFINE_RADIUS"

steps.name: Parallel medium-grid verification for refined candidates
steps.command:
set -euo pipefail
ITER={loop.iteration}
uv run python .pi/scripts/parallelogram_grid_search.py sweep \
  --root "{input.outputRoot}" \
  --iteration "{loop.iteration}" \
  --stage medium \
  --input-csv "{input.outputRoot}/iterations/iter_$ITER/refined_candidates.csv" \
  --grid "{input.mediumGrid}" \
  --parallel "{input.mediumParallel}" \
  --solver-limit "{input.mediumSolverLimit}" \
  --solver-threads "{input.solverThreads}" \
  --wall-timeout 7200

steps.name: Promote top medium candidates to final 2048 verification
steps.command:
set -euo pipefail
ITER={loop.iteration}
uv run python .pi/scripts/parallelogram_grid_search.py select \
  --input-csv "{input.outputRoot}/iterations/iter_$ITER/medium/medium_results.csv" \
  --output-csv "{input.outputRoot}/iterations/iter_$ITER/final_promoted.csv" \
  --family-top-k 0 \
  --global-top-k "{input.mediumPromote}" \
  --max-selected "{input.mediumPromote}"

steps.name: Parallel final 2048 verification with 30-minute solver budget
steps.command:
set -euo pipefail
ITER={loop.iteration}
uv run python .pi/scripts/parallelogram_grid_search.py sweep \
  --root "{input.outputRoot}" \
  --iteration "{loop.iteration}" \
  --stage final \
  --input-csv "{input.outputRoot}/iterations/iter_$ITER/final_promoted.csv" \
  --grid "{input.finalGrid}" \
  --parallel "{input.finalParallel}" \
  --solver-limit "{input.finalSolverLimit}" \
  --solver-threads "{input.solverThreads}" \
  --wall-timeout 10800

steps.name: Update best-state and write concise markdown report; never fail on no improvement
steps.command:
set -euo pipefail
ITER={loop.iteration}
uv run python .pi/scripts/parallelogram_grid_search.py report \
  --root "{input.outputRoot}" \
  --iteration "{loop.iteration}" \
  --final-csv "{input.outputRoot}/iterations/iter_$ITER/final/final_results.csv"

steps.name: Four concise strategy notes for the next loop

branches.prompt: Read {input.outputRoot}/reports/shared_context.md. Write a super concise markdown note (<=8 bullets) on scale-family next moves to {input.outputRoot}/reports/agents/iter_{loop.iteration}_scale.md. Include only actionable observations; no long prose.

Read {input.outputRoot}/reports/shared_context.md. Write a super concise markdown note (<=8 bullets) on shear/area-preserving next moves to {input.outputRoot}/reports/agents/iter_{loop.iteration}_shear.md. Include only actionable observations; no long prose.

Read {input.outputRoot}/reports/shared_context.md. Write a super concise markdown note (<=8 bullets) on coordinate perturbation next moves to {input.outputRoot}/reports/agents/iter_{loop.iteration}_coordinate.md. Include only actionable observations; no long prose.

Read {input.outputRoot}/reports/shared_context.md. Write a super concise markdown note (<=8 bullets) on deterministic local-cloud/LHS next moves to {input.outputRoot}/reports/agents/iter_{loop.iteration}_cloud.md. Include only actionable observations; no long prose.

steps.name: Append agent notes to shared context for later iterations
steps.command:
set -euo pipefail
uv run python .pi/scripts/parallelogram_grid_search.py collect-agent-notes --root "{input.outputRoot}" --iteration "{loop.iteration}"

steps.name: Print final search state and report locations
steps.command:
set -euo pipefail
echo 'state:'
uv run python - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
root=Path("{input.outputRoot}")
print(json.dumps(json.loads((root/'state.json').read_text()), indent=2, sort_keys=True)[:12000])
print('shared_context=' + str(root/'reports'/'shared_context.md'))
print('jobs_db=' + str(root/'jobs'/'parallelogram-coarse-grid-loop.sqlite'))
PY
